channel.title: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen - hoatepdev | Full-stack Developer
channel.description: I'm Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen, a graduate with a Bachelor's degree from Post and Telecommunication Institute of Technology (PTIT), driven by a sincere passion for Software Engineering.

item.title: Byte Gear - GEARVN E-Commerce Platform
item.description: Modern full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js 15 and NestJS 11 for selling high-end PCs, laptops, and gaming equipment. Features real-time chat, payment integration, blog system, and comprehensive admin dashboard.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: js-ultimate — A Lightweight, TypeScript-Powered Utility Library
item.description: js-ultimate is a lightweight utility library offering powerful functions with zero dependencies and strong TypeScript support, aiming to replace lodash in modern web development.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: nestjs-super — Advanced Starter Template for NestJS Applications
item.description: A powerful, well-architected starter template for NestJS projects, including Prisma integration, testing setup, structured folder organization, and best practices out of the box.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: YouTube Member Video Downloader Script
item.description: A shell script using yt-dlp to download YouTube videos (including members-only / age-restricted) from a list, using cookies for authentication and best video/audio merging.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Technova - Professional Outsourcing IT Platform
item.description: A professional outsourcing IT platform built with Next.js & TypeScript, designed to showcase IT services, portfolio projects, and connect clients with developers. Featuring clean UI, great performance, and a developer-friendly tech stack.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Werewolf Game - Multiplayer Party Game Platform
item.description: An innovative, fully automated Werewolf (Ma Sói) game platform that removes the need for a human moderator. Players sit in a circle, connect to the game on one device, and experience a seamless, AI-powered game flow.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: hoatepdev - Modern Portfolio & Blog Platform
item.description: A comprehensive, high-performance portfolio and blog platform built with Next.js 15, React 18, and Turborepo. Features modern architecture, optimized performance, and developer-friendly configuration system.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Celebrate Birthdays Virtually with an Interactive Cake Blowing
item.description: Celebrate Birthdays Virtually with an Interactive Cake Blowing
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Turbocharging Next.js: 10 Essential Techniques for Optimal Web Performance
item.description: Turbocharging Next.js: 10 Essential Techniques for Optimal Web Performance
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Food G — Modern Food Delivery & E-Commerce App
item.description: Food G is a modern React-based food delivery and e-commerce application with Firebase integration, featuring a full shopping experience, responsive design, and advanced UI interactions.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Dev.to Clone - Full-Stack Developer Community Platform
item.description: A full-stack developer community platform inspired by dev.to, built with modern web technologies. Features real-time interactions, article management, user authentication, and a clean, responsive UI designed for developers.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Birthday Cake - Interactive Greeting App
item.description: A fun, interactive birthday cake web app built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features animated candles, background music, and optional microphone integration to blow out candles in real life.
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: Work multiple accounts git
item.description: Work multiple accounts git - super simple and effective
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen

item.title: The overall flow of Gitflow
item.description: The strategy for managing Git branches
item.author: Hoà T. (Thomas) Nguyen
